lever: Inline per-equation AD tape VarId and Value scratch/storage with SmallVec<[T; 2]> instead of heap Vec allocations.

benchmark.mode: RCH-invoked local fallback for both baseline and candidate

isomorphism.ordering_preserved: yes; tape entries, input/output VarId order, reverse traversal, and cotangent accumulation order are unchanged
isomorphism.tie_breaking_unchanged: yes; no comparisons or tie rules changed
isomorphism.floating_point: identical; arithmetic and VJP calls are unchanged, only container storage moved inline for arity <= 2
isomorphism.rng: not applicable; no RNG paths touched
isomorphism.fallbacks: unchanged; SmallVec spills to heap for larger arity and existing eval/VJP/error paths remain in place

checks: RUSTFLAGS="--cap-lints allow" cargo clippy -p fj-ad --all-targets -- -D warnings
